title: VSaveModel Method, Spel Class
syntax: Sub VSaveModel (Sequence As String, Object As String, Path As String)
parameters:
Sequence	String containing
		 the name of a sequence in the current project.

Object	String containing
		 the name of a object. The object must be a Correlation, Geometric,
		 or Polar.

Path	Full path
		 name of the file to save the model to, excluding the extension.
description: Save a vision object search model to a PC disk file.
notes:
When VSaveModel is executed, Epson RC+ 8.0 creates two files (Path + extensions):  Path.VOB,  Path.MDL

For correlation and geometric models, the ModelOrgX and ModelOrgY values are saved along with the model window.

For Polar models, the Radius, Thickness, and AngleOffset are saved.
see_also:
VLoadModel

VSaveModel Example

VB Example:

m_spel.VSaveModel("seq01", "corr01", "d:\models\part1")

C#
